title: Lesson 22 (Vocab) - ぺこぺこ, ぴかぴか, ぽかぽか...
description: These are "Manner" words. ぺこぺこ (Hungry), ぴかぴか (Sparkly).

items.gloss: very hungry; starving; famished; fawning; bowing and scraping; being obsequious; being servile; kowtowing; bowing repeatedly; cringing; giving in; being dented
with a glitter; with a sparkle; brand new; shiny and new
pleasantly warm; nice and warm; repeatedly (hitting someone); again and again; over and over
toot (e.g. of trumpet); honk (e.g. of klaxon); beep; farting sound; sound of something being inflated; puff; poof; phoo
